seoTitle: Calwell vs Campbell — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Calwell and Campbell. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Calwell and Campbell.
heading: Calwell vs Campbell — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Calwell, Australian Capital Territory and Campbell, Australian Capital Territory. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Calwell has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Campbell (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Calwell or Campbell safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Calwell has a flood risk score of 49/100, while Campbell scores 31/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Calwell scores 27/100 for bushfire risk. Campbell scores 46/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Calwell or Campbell?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Calwell has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.73% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
